title: ADMEOOD Drug Property OOD Benchmark

data_urls.access_notes: Official data/repository URL must be verified before automatic use.

instructions: Verify the official ADMEOOD data location before constructing an audit.
If data are available, record property name, molecule identifier, SMILES, label, confidence/noise environment, concept-conflict flag, and split.
Use this entry as a Dataset Scout candidate, not a default download, until source location and license are confirmed.

scale.download_size: reported as 27 ADME properties; exact packaged size/source requires verification

recommended_axes.name: chemical_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Molecular fingerprint, scaffold, or descriptor similarity to training compounds.

recommended_axes.name: noise_confidence_environment
recommended_axes.definition: Similarity over confidence/noise environments defined by measurement reliability.

recommended_axes.name: concept_conflict_drift
recommended_axes.definition: Similarity or grouping by inconsistent-label or concept-conflict regimes.

useful_for: Drug-property OOD audits when source package is verified.
Testing whether molecular models degrade across measurement-noise and concept-conflict environments.
Complementing DrugOOD and WelQrate with ADME-property-specific shifts.
leakage_risks: Source and license are not yet verified in the catalog.
Repeated molecules across properties can leak compound identity.
Noise/conflict annotations may be post-hoc if derived from held-out labels.

paperclip_provenance.notes: Paperclip identified ADMEOOD as a drug-property OOD benchmark with noise shift and concept-conflict drift; official data source needs verification.
